description.ko: 유기적 흐름의 개념을 시각적 명상으로 풀어내어, 자연 생명체의 우아함을 닮은 유체 형상의 매끄럽고 리드미컬한 변화를 포착했습니다.
description.en: A visual meditation on the concept of organic flow, capturing the seamless and rhythmic transition of fluid shapes that mimic the grace of natural life forms.

prompt: A cinematic high-resolution visual of fluid organic forms, resembling translucent silk and liquid bioluminescence intertwining in a zero-gravity environment. Soft iridescent gradients of teal, soft violet, and pearlescent white. Macro photography style with shallow depth of field, hyper-realistic textures, smooth rhythmic curves, 8k resolution, serene and atmospheric lighting.
